About

A practical builder with a sharp academic foundation.

Mohammad Al Amin is a Computer Science student at Islamic University of Madinah and a Web Developer at Artemesis Company. His work sits at the useful intersection of elegant interfaces, reliable backend systems, mobile products, and intelligent automation.

He builds websites, web applications, mobile apps, and automation systems with a clean engineering mindset: responsive experiences, maintainable components, and details that make a product feel international.

CS Student

Studying Computer Science at Islamic University of Madinah.

Product Engineer

Building web, mobile, and automation systems at Artemesis Company.

Premium UI Focus

Designing modern responsive interfaces with clean motion and strong detail.

Skills / Expertise

Full-stack capability with a modern automation edge.

From backend logic to polished product interfaces, Mohammad works across the stack to ship fast, responsive, and useful digital systems.
